text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: mmokhi
Date: Thu Mar  2 09:25:11 UTC 2017
New revision: 435219
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/435219

Log:
  sysutils/myrescue: Add the port to the tree.
  myrescue is a program to rescue the still-readable data from a damaged
  hard-disk, similar in purpose to dd_rescue.

  PR:     217433
  Submitted by:   Mageirias Anastasios <anastasios@mageirias.com>
  Reported by:    Mageirias Anastasios <anastasios@mageirias.com>
  Reviewed by:    feld, mat
  Approved by:    feld, mat (mentors)
  Differential Revision:  https://reviews.freebsd.org/D9845

Changes:

  head/sysutils/myrescue/
  head/sysutils/myrescue/Makefile
  head/sysutils/myrescue/distinfo
  head/sysutils/myrescue/files/
  head/sysutils/myrescue/files/patch-myrescue.c
  head/sysutils/myrescue/pkg-descr
